content.problemStatement:
You are given two objects.

```js
userInfo = { name: "John", age: 30 }
userContact = { email: "john@example.com", phone: "1234567890" }
```

Merge them into a single object named `userProfile` using the spread operator.

### Expected Output
```js
{
  name: "John",
  age: 30,
  email: "john@example.com",
  phone: "1234567890",
}
```
